about: I am an Analyst skilled in SQL, Python, and Power BI with experience in analyzing user journeys, driving UX enhancements, and automating reporting workflows. Proven track record of improving conversion, reducing drop-offs, and enhancing decision-making through impactful dashboards and data-driven insights. Demonstrated success in optimizing processes through robust statistical analysis and experimentation (A/B testing, funnel analysis, RCA).

education.school: Netaji Subhas University of Technology (NSUT), Delhi

experience.description: A global professional services firm specializing in performance improvement, turnaround management and advisory.
bullets: Conducted deep-dive diagnostics across 3+ industries to identify user, process, and pricing inefficiencies, uncovering opportunities for 5-10% cost improvement.
Designed and enhanced core dashboards in RAPID, a prescriptive analytics tool used by clients to evaluate pricing, leakage, and margin performance.
Introduced AI-assisted quality checks and hypothesis validation workflows, reducing analytical turnaround time by 30% for cross-functional teams.
Managed and prioritized 20+ deliverables across product, client, and analytics tracks, ensuring 100% on-time handoffs for senior stakeholders.
Partnered with client product leaders to translate business gaps into measurable metrics, enabling faster decision-making and operational improvements.

experience.description: India's premier full-stack real estate platform providing comprehensive home-seeking solutions.
bullets: Analyzed Buy journey via GA4 and SQL, pinpointing drop-offs to drive UX changes and a 10.2% conversion.
Redesigned Truecaller login flow with a verification screen to eliminate accidental submissions, increasing MQLs by 70% and CVR by 13%.
Revamped the homepage's first fold by decluttering redundant elements, simplifying content and adding personalized recommendations, boosting search visits by 26% and CTR by 14.6%.
Built and owned cross-channel user behavior dashboards that informed re-engagement strategies, increasing return visits by 12%.
Streamlined onboarding from 5 to 3 steps by deconstructing flows and exposing drop-offs, boosting lead conversion by 8.2% and engagement by 33%.

Owned revamp of property view experience, enriching listing metadata (UX, CTAs, virtual tours) to boost session duration by 15%, cut bounce across 28% of sessions, and strengthen user intent for lead conversion.

caseStudies.name: Fantasy Cricket Squad Optimization
bullets: Engineered a data pipeline to scrape and process over 1 million rows of T20 player data from ESPNcricinfo using Bright Data and Pandas.
Built an interactive Power BI dashboard to analyze player performance metrics; utilized DAX for complex calculations to determine the optimal team composition, boosting team win probability to 90%.

caseStudies.name: Rando San – SaaS App
bullets: Engineered behavioral models on 100k users to track retention and core growth metrics.
Leveraged cohort analysis and attention matrices to optimize customer acquisition strategies.

certifications: Product Analytics Certification by Product School
Career Essential in Business Analysis by Microsoft & Linkedin
books: Lean Analytics by Alistair Croll & Benjamin Yoskovitz
Hooked: How to Build Habit-Forming Products by Nir Eyal
Designing Data-Intensive Applications by Martin Kleppmann
